title: EventBodyEncrypted
description: A single event object in the Inspector v1 track request body with encrypted event properties. Used when env != prod and publicEncryptionKey is provided.

apiKey.description: The Inspector API key passed to the constructor.

appName.description: Application name. Empty string if not provided.

libVersion.description: SDK library version. Plain SemVer string, no suffix.

env.description: Environment. Encryption is only active in dev and staging.

anonymousId.description: Caller-supplied streamId, or empty string if none provided.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision.

publicEncryptionKey.description: P-256 public key in hex (compressed 66 chars or uncompressed 130 chars). Required when encryption is active.

eventProperties.description: Extracted schema — array of encrypted property objects. List-type properties are omitted.

avoFunction.description: true if sent via _avoFunctionTrackSchemaFromEvent; false for trackSchemaFromEvent.

eventId.description: Avo Codegen event ID. Must be null when avoFunction is false.

eventHash.description: Avo Codegen event hash. Must be null when avoFunction is false.
